name: IServiceManager
summary: Defines a mechanism for registering and retrieving a service object; that is, an object that provides custom support to other objects.

methods.name: RegisterService(T)
methods.summary: Allows extension applications to register some specific service by its type. Only one service of a given type can be registered.

returns.doc: A key for the registered service if registeration is successful else null.

methods.name: Service
methods.summary: Gets the service object of the specified type.

returns.doc: The service object if registered else null

methods.name: UnregisterService(string)
methods.summary: Unregisters a service of given type registered with given key.

params.name: serviceKey
params.doc: The service key to ensure that only authorized client is unregistering this service type.
